comment:
Vercel is connected to the repo - great! The deployment will trigger on push, but the build requires environment variables to be set in the Vercel dashboard.

**Still needed in Vercel Settings > Environment Variables:**

1. `DATABASE_URL` - PostgreSQL connection string (from Supabase/Neon)
2. `JWT_SECRET` - Random 256-bit string for auth
3. `NEXTAUTH_URL` - Your production URL (e.g., https://your-app.vercel.app)
4. `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` - Random string for NextAuth

Once these are set, the next push to `master` will trigger a successful deployment on Vercel. Let me know when they are configured and I will verify the build.
